sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Jesuh singlamteh nuai-ah, keimah ka khawl nuam hi;
Ni a sat phatna gam sungah, Suangpi liim
bang ahi;
Gimna le tawlna gam sungah, Tawldamna innpi hi;
Vangik puate’n van khia dinga, A
gimte’ khawlna’ng hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Jesuh singlamteh liim ah, khawlmun nuam pen
ahi;
Vantung itna le thu manna, kituahna mun ahi;
Mi siangthote’n a mang sungah, Amuh kahlei
bang hi;
Tua sing khuam kei ading hi-a, vantung kahlei ahi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Singlamteh galmuh khop
ah, Nilim liap khat om hi;
A lipkhap huai hankhuk hi-a, zai-in thuk mahmah hi;
Tua hankhuk le ei
kikalah singlamteh khat om hi;
Singlamteh in lam hong laka, van gam lam hong hilh
hi.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Jesuh’n singlamteh tungah, kei tang gimna thuak hi;
A thuak gimna ka
ngaihsun a, hong itna ka mu hi;
Khitui luang kawm ka lungsim ah, thu nih ka phawk thei hi;
Ka
mawhna le a hong itna, hih thute gel ahi.

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: Jesuh’n singlamteh liim mah, keima omna
ahi;
Amai vangtang longal van-ah, Nitang kisam lo hi;
Leitung nopsakna le hauhna, ka lunggulh nawn
kei hi;
Ka mawhnate zumna hi-a, singlamteh meetna hi.
